cycle_pooling_rule: WTINT6YR = WTINT2YR / 3 for pooled 2007-2012 questionnaire-only models.
notes: Use only when no MEC/exam/lab/spirometry variables are included.

cycle_pooling_rule: WTMEC6YR = WTMEC2YR / 3 for pooled 2007-2012 MEC models.
notes: MEC weight applies when body measures are included.

cycle_pooling_rule: WTMEC6YR = WTMEC2YR / 3 for pooled 2007-2012 spirometry models.
notes: CDC SPX analytic notes specify full-sample 2-year MEC exam weight for spirometry.

cycle_pooling_rule: WTMEC6YR = WTMEC2YR / 3 for listed full-sample exam/lab optional markers unless component notes require otherwise.
notes: Avoid fasting triglycerides in core because fasting subsample weights would narrow the sample.

cycle_pooling_rule: Deferred; not part of V0.1 cross-sectional NHANES replication mapping.
notes: Mortality extension requires a separate linked-mortality variable and eligibility lock.
